import { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import Plot from 'react-plotly.js'; export default function TeacherDashboard() { const [activeClass, setActiveClass] = useState('Class 12 - Div A'); // Multi-line chart data (Class Average vs Top Performer) const chartData = [ { x: ['Week 1', 'Week 2', 'Week 3', 'Week 4', 'Week 5'], y: [65, 72, 70, 78, 85], type: 'scatter', mode: 'lines+markers', name: 'Class Average', line: { color: '#00d4ff', width: 3 }, marker: { size: 8 } }, { x: ['Week 1', 'Week 2', 'Week 3', 'Week 4', 'Week 5'], y: [85, 88, 92, 94, 98], type: 'scatter', mode: 'lines', name: 'Top Performer', line: { color: '#7c3aed', width: 2, dash: 'dot' } } ]; return (
{/* Teacher Sidebar */}
{/* Avatar placeholder */}

Dr. Harish Vyas

HOD Physics

Dashboard
{/* Main Content Area */}
{/* Section 1: Top Metrics */}
{[ { title: "Avg Class Score", val: "85%", inc: "+5%", desc: "vs last week" }, { title: "Active Students", val: "42", sub: "/ 45", inc: "93%", desc: "Completion rate" }, { title: "Labs Completed", val: "128", inc: "+12", desc: "This week" }, { title: "Needs Attention", val: "3", alert: true, desc: "Students falling behind" } ].map((stat, i) => (
{stat.title}
{stat.val} {stat.sub && {stat.sub}}
{stat.inc} {stat.desc}
))}
{/* Section 2: Chart & Needs Attention */}

Class Performance (Last 5 Weeks)

Needs Attention

{[ { name: "Rahul Sharma", issue: "Missed 2 Labs", score: "45%" }, { name: "Kavya Menon", issue: "Failed Ohm's Law", score: "52%" }, { name: "Aman Gupta", issue: "Inactive for 1 week", score: "60%" } ].map((student, i) => (
{student.name}
{student.issue}
{student.score}
))}
{/* Section 3: Recent Activity */}

Live Activity Feed

Live
{[ { user: "Sneha Patel", action: "completed", lab: "Simple Pendulum", time: "Just now", score: "92%" }, { user: "Arjun M.", action: "started", lab: "Projectile Motion", time: "5 mins ago", score: "-" }, { user: "Rohan K.", action: "submitted journal for", lab: "Acid-Base Titration", time: "12 mins ago", score: "88%" }, ].map((act, i) => (
{act.user.charAt(0)}
{act.user} {act.action} {act.lab}
{act.time}
{act.score}
))}
); }
